name: OrbStack (Fast Docker Desktop Replacement for Mac)
pricing_notes: Free for personal use; Pro $8/mo for teams/commercial use

auth.notes: Local tool; Docker Desktop compatible API

performance.notes: 5-10x faster than Docker Desktop on Mac; minimal battery impact

agent_readiness.notes: Fast Docker Desktop replacement for macOS. Full Docker API compatibility. orb (CLI). Built-in Linux VMs: orb create ubuntu my-machine. orb ssh my-machine. File sharing via virtio-fs. Rosetta for x86 on Apple Silicon. Kubernetes support. Docker Compose works natively. .local domain for containers. No separate VM management. Dramatically faster container start and file I/O than Docker Desktop. Popular with Mac developers since Docker Desktop licensing change.

gotchas: Some advanced Docker Desktop features may differ
Rosetta x86 emulation slower than native arm64
best_when: Teams needing faster Docker container builds and file I/O
Linux VM management on Mac alongside Docker
Apple Silicon Macs running Docker without performance tax
avoid_when: Air-gapped enterprise environments with software approval processes
When Docker Desktop team licensing already paid for
summary: OrbStack is the fast, lightweight Docker Desktop replacement for macOS. Full Docker API compatibility — no changes to existing docker-compose workflows. 5-10x faster builds and file I/O. Built-in Linux VMs (orb create ubuntu). Rosetta for x86 containers on Apple Silicon. .local domain for containers. Free for personal use. The default choice for Mac developers after Docker Desktop's licensing change.
